message:
fix(schema): exclude v15 recipients_json migration from franken base mode

The v15_add_recipients_json_to_messages migration can fail canonical
ALTER TABLE ... ADD COLUMN reparsing under the base (frankensearch)
engine when encountering legacy Python-shaped messages tables. Since
base-mode startup and compatibility probes don't require the
recipients_json column, skip this migration alongside the other
unsupported-by-franken migrations to avoid breaking existing databases.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
